long: 1 · Manual craft (do it well by hand)
3 · M365 Copilot (acts in the app you write in)

themes.title: Clarity & conciseness
rungs: Tighten this draft — same message, half the words
Rewrite this selection in place: clearer, shorter, same meaning
Batch-rewrite a library of standard texts to the new standard

themes.title: Tone & audience
notes: the survey's dominant cluster — most lessons live here
rungs: Reword for the reader — formal, firm, or friendly
Adjust the tone of this draft for its audience, in place
Generate audience-tuned variants of a template set

themes.title: Structure & framing
notes: lead with the ask; bullets to prose and back
rungs: Restructure this: lead with the ask, turn bullets into prose
Draft the message from these bullet points, in the app
Build skeleton templates for your recurring message types

themes.title: Correctness
rungs: Proof this — grammar, spelling, punctuation, house style
Check and correct the draft in place
Build a house-style checklist and apply it across a document set

themes.title: Condense & summarise
notes: threads, meeting notes, reports — keep every ask and owner
rungs: Summarise this thread or these notes — keep every ask and owner
Summarise the thread and draft the minutes, in the app
Build the meeting-pack generator: notes in, minutes + actions out

lessons.title: Tighten: cut the flab, keep the message
Summarise a thread without losing the ask

candidates.working_title: Say exactly one thing: killing ambiguity
candidates.survey_signal: "professional writing for external stakeholders where ambiguity is removed"
"write emails/formalise"; "write intro email from data"; moved from Outlook frame

candidates.working_title: Lead with the answer: bottom line up front
candidates.survey_signal: "preparing submissions for GDM or other audiences"
"meeting notes to text"; "summarise meeting notes & populate minutes"
